title: UnDercontrol Account Resource
description: Schema for account YAML resource files. Accounts represent financial accounts (checking, savings, credit cards, etc.) with a balance.

off_budget.description: If true, account is tracked but excluded from budget calculations.

example.description:
Example account YAML:

apiVersion: ud/v1
kind: Account
metadata:
  tags: [bank]
spec:
  name: Checking
  balance:
    amount: 5000.00
    currency: USD
  off_budget: false
  notes: Primary checking account
